{{Quote|Lets see, yes, you could probably assist me. I've heard of a clan of the dangerous Nightsisters that has developed a strange symbiosis with some other creatures than the Rancor. I'd appreciate it if you could find out what's going on out there.|Inquisitor Olof to an individual.|<ref name="SWG:IO" />}}
'''Olof''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was seen in the [[Dathomir Imperial Prison|Imperial Prison]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] and once heard of a clan of dangerous [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]], the [[Spiderclan/Legends|Spiderclan]], who had developed a strange symbiosis with some other creatures than the [[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]]. He tasked an individual with seeking out this group, and pointed them towards the [[Nightspider Cult cave]].

==Behind the scenes==
Olof was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:IO" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Olof was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 1 Notes: 13 August 03|Publish 1]]" update, released on [[August 3]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60888|text=Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave}}</ref>
